channel.title: network on Dorin Fodor
channel.description: Recent content in network on Dorin Fodor

item.title: C++: Building a DNS query tool - What I learned
item.description: Preface So I made this CLI tool which lets you query for a domain name and it returns one or more IPs. It’s pretty much just an interface for your DNS server (8.8.8.8, 1.1.1.1, etc.). Check it out here: https://github.com/dorin131/dns-query It only has your standard libraries which are probably included with your OS (Linux), so compiling it should not be a challenge. You would tell it: ./dns fodor.org And you should get back something like:
